name: Bob Sheppard
abstract: Bob Sheppard is an American jazz musician who plays saxophone, clarinet, and flute. He has been a touring and studio musician for albums, film, and television and has released solo albums.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Chick Corea and Friends
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
about_quotes.evidence: all the musicians I recorded with on his last record did it for free. We all did it for free. I’m talking about Bob Sheppard.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hubert Laws — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: David Finck
about_quotes.evidence: Bob Sheppard lives in Los Angeles and I said I just need two short solos so I did that high tech, with e-mail.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Finck interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 29, 2015

about_quotes.speaker: Clay Jenkins
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...in the whole recording there’s the head and then I think the sax player plays. >> [INTERVIEWEE] Uh huh. Bob Sheppard.
about_quotes.doc_title: Clay Jenkins interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, March 18, 2016
